: 28134075

254-260, Avvai Shanmugam Salai 
Royapettah 
Chennai 600 014 
05.08.2019 
The Vice President 
National Stock Exchange of India Limited 
"Exchange Plaza", Bandra Kurla 
Complex, Bandra East 
Mumbai - 400 051.  
The Manager 
B S E Limited 
Phiroze Jeejibhai Towers 
Dalal Street 
Mumbai - 400 001.  
Dear Sir, 
Sub : Corporate Announcement - NSE Symbol : INDIANB - Scrip Code : 532814.  
This is to inform that the Bank has arranged for a concall with the analysts/Investors 
to discuss on the Reviewed (Standalone & Consolidated) Financial Results of the 
Bank for the quarter ended June 30, 2019 at 5.00 p.m. on August 05, 2019. 
This is in compliance to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015. 
We request you to take the same on record. 
Yours faithfully, 
(Bimal Shah ) 
Company Secretary & Compliance Officer
